name: Triple Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. Cook the chocolate pudding in a large saucepan as directed on the package.
4. Blend the dry cake mix thoroughly into the hot pudding, beating by hand or with a mixer for 1-2 minutes.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan.
6. Sprinkle the batter with chocolate pieces and nuts.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Serve warm or cool.
